titles.title: God is so good to me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I had my sad days And there were hills to climb I had my bad days And then a weary mind But when I look above And all these things around God is so good to me I can't complain

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is so good to me Yes, He's so good to me More than this world could be He's so good to me His Spirit came to me And gave me victory God is so good to me I can't complain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes these clouds hang on And I'd like to see them go I ask this question, Lord " Why so much pain?" But He knows what's best for me Although I cannot see God is so good to me I can't complain
